aurumosKey.title: API Key
aurumosKey.description: API key from aurum-transfers.com/referral-partners. Optional — required only for write operations (bookings, directory edits) and bulk affiliate lookups. Public read-only catalog tools work without a key.

defaultPassengers.title: Default Passengers
defaultPassengers.description: Default number of passengers for quotes (optional, default: 2)

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Preferred currency for quotes (optional, default: USD)
